name: Stripe
description: Online payments platform providing APIs to process payments, manage customers, subscriptions, payouts, and financial products.

auth_methods.note: Stripe documents authenticating API requests using HTTP Basic Auth with the secret key (secret key as username) and examples using Authorization: Bearer {SECRET_KEY}; API keys include secret and publishable keys.

credential_access.note: Docs explain developers obtain API keys from the Dashboard (create test keys) and the Dashboard page indicates keys can be created when signed in; no human approval is required for standard account/API key creation.

api_surface.note: Stripe API Reference documents a comprehensive REST API with resources covering Charges, Customers, PaymentIntents, Subscriptions, Connect, etc.; the API Explorer lets you make live requests.

buildability.note: Public docs exist and developers can self-serve API keys from the Dashboard (test mode) to build integrations immediately.

queries: Stripe authentication API keys Basic Auth Bearer
Stripe Connect pricing enterprise contact sales
